title: Thumper
notes: Minor shader compilation stutter, and screensaver/dpms not blocked when using steam controller. Otherwise perfect.

title: Thumper
notes:
Sync to vblank in settings was set by default, but was limiting FPS to 60 instead of the 100 my monitor supports. Set it manually to 100 and all was well.

Secondly I realised the audio was a bit too far behind for me, so I configured pulseaudio a bit.

I edited /etc/pulse/daemon.conf and changed these lines:

resample-method = speex-float-1
default-fragments = 2
default-fragment-size-msec = 5

and /etc/pulse/default.pa. Changed tsched to equal 0.

load-module module-udev-detect tsched=0

This reduced the latency from around 200ms to 10ms according to:
pactl list sinks
and I didn't notice any reduction in quality with an onboard soundcard.
os: Arch Linux 64-bit - 4.18.3-arch1-1-ARCH #1 SMP PREEMPT Sat Aug 18 09:22:54 UTC 2018 x86_64 GNU/Linux
